Metadata.title: Flashy Cardy
Metadata.description: Learn anything by creating, managing, and studying flashcards.

Common.name: Name
Common.checkForm: Please check the form and try again.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.saveError: Unable to save language. Please try again.

Dashboard.title: Your Decks
Dashboard.subtitle: Manage and study your flashcard decks.
Dashboard.emptyDescription: Create your first deck to start building and studying flashcards.

DeckDetail.emptyCardsDescription: Add your first card to start studying this deck.

StudyClient.emptyDescription: Add some cards to start studying.
StudyClient.studiedAll: You studied all {count} {count, plural, one {card} other {cards}}.
StudyClient.skippedOne: 1 card was skipped without a rating.
StudyClient.skippedMany: {count} cards were skipped without a rating.
StudyClient.flipHint: Click or press Space to flip
StudyClient.keyboardHints: Use ← → to navigate · Space to flip
StudyClient.ariaBack: Card showing back — click to show front
StudyClient.ariaFront: Card showing front — click to show back
StudyClient.ariaUpload: Document upload: drag and drop a file or press Enter to choose

Analytics.title: Analytics
Analytics.subtitle: A record of all your study sessions.
Analytics.emptyDescription: Complete a study session to start tracking your progress here.

Pricing.title: Choose Your plan
Pricing.subtitle: Unlock the full potential of your flashcard learning experience with our flexible pricing plans.

CreateDeck.limitDescription: Free plans are limited to 3 decks. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited decks and more.
CreateDeck.dialogDescriptionTabs: Enter a name and description, or generate a deck from a document (Pro).
CreateDeck.dialogDescriptionSimple: Give your deck a name and an optional description.
CreateDeck.docIntro: Upload lecture notes or slides as PDF, Word (.docx), or PowerPoint (.pptx). We extract text, pick a title and description, and add 20 study questions as flashcards.
CreateDeck.dragDropLine1: Drag and drop a file here, or
CreateDeck.docHint: PDF, Word (.docx), or PowerPoint (.pptx), up to {maxMb} MB
CreateDeck.errorFileSize: File must be at most {maxMb} MB.
CreateDeck.errorReadFile: Could not read the file. Try again.
CreateDeck.ariaUpload: Document upload: drag and drop a file or press Enter to choose

EditDeck.title: Edit Deck
EditDeck.description: Update the name and description of this deck.

DeleteDeck.title: Delete «{name}»?
DeleteDeck.description: This cannot be undone. The deck will be removed from your library. {cards}
DeleteDeck.cardsNone: There are no cards in this deck.
DeleteDeck.cardsOne: The 1 card in this deck will be permanently deleted.
DeleteDeck.cardsMany: All {count} cards in this deck will be permanently deleted.

AddCard.title: Add New Card
AddCard.description: Create a new flashcard for this deck. Add content for both the front and back of the card.

EditCard.title: Edit Card
EditCard.description: Update the front and back of this flashcard.

DeleteCard.title: Delete card?
DeleteCard.description: This action cannot be undone. The card will be permanently deleted.

GenerateCards.tooltipNeedDescription: Add a description to your deck first so AI can generate relevant cards.

DashboardTour.step1Content: New Deck is where you create a flashcard deck. Click it to add your first deck and start studying!

Actions.deckLimitReached: You've reached the 3-deck limit on the free plan. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited decks.
Actions.documentDeckProRequired: Document-based deck generation requires a Pro plan with this feature enabled.
Actions.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type. Upload a .pdf, .docx, or .pptx file.
Actions.fileSizeExceeded: File must be non-empty and at most {maxMb} MB.
Actions.noTextInFile: Could not read any text from this file. Try another format or export.
Actions.documentReadError: Could not read this document. Check the file and try again.
Actions.deckGenFailed: Could not generate a deck from this document. Try again with a clearer file.
Actions.saveDeckFailed: Failed to save the deck. Please try again.
Actions.aiGenProRequired: AI flashcard generation requires a Pro plan.
Actions.addDescriptionFirst: Add a description to your deck before generating cards.
Actions.generateCardsFailed: Failed to generate cards. Please try again.
